## Summary

Describe the user-visible change and why it belongs in Maia-2.

## Validation

List the exact commands, Python/PyTorch versions, and devices tested. For
device-related changes, report CPU, CUDA, and MPS coverage where available.

## Checklist

- [ ] I added or updated tests for behavior changes.
- [ ] `python -m pytest -q` passes.
- [ ] Ruff check and formatting validation pass.
- [ ] I did not add credentials, model checkpoints, or large datasets.
- [ ] I considered checkpoint and CPU/CUDA/MPS compatibility.
- [ ] I updated documentation and dependency metadata where needed.
